---
title: "Reference"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  comment: ""
---

This page renders the current CLI help by running the built `ir` executable during the Quarto render.

```{r}
ir_bin <- Sys.getenv("IR_BIN", unset = "")
if (!nzchar(ir_bin)) {
  status <- system2("cargo", c("build", "--manifest-path", "../Cargo.toml"))
  if (!identical(status, 0L)) {
    stop("`cargo build` failed with status ", status, call. = FALSE)
  }
  ir_bin <- file.path("..", "target", "debug", "ir")
}

cli_help <- function(...) {
  args <- c(..., "--help")
  old_options <- options(cli.num_colors = 256L)
  on.exit(options(old_options), add = TRUE)

  output <- system2(
    ir_bin,
    args,
    stdout = TRUE,
    stderr = TRUE,
    env = c("CLICOLOR_FORCE=1", "CLICOLOR=1")
  )
  status <- attr(output, "status")

  if (!is.null(status)) {
    stop(
      "`", ir_bin, " ", paste(args, collapse = " "), "` failed with status ", status,
      call. = FALSE
    )
  }

  output <- htmltools::htmlEscape(output)
  output <- fansi::sgr_to_html(output, term.cap = "256")
  knitr::asis_output(paste0(
    "<pre class=\"ir-cli-help\"><code>",
    paste(output, collapse = "\n"),
    "</code></pre>\n"
  ))
}
```

## `ir`

```{r}
cli_help()
```

## `ir run`

```{r}
cli_help("run")
```

## `ir render`

```{r}
cli_help("render")
```

## `ir tool`

```{r}
cli_help("tool")
```

## `ir tool run`

```{r}
cli_help("tool", "run")
```

## `ir tool install`

```{r}
cli_help("tool", "install")
```

## `ir cache`

```{r}
cli_help("cache")
```

## `ir cache dir`

```{r}
cli_help("cache", "dir")
```

## `ir cache clean`

```{r}
cli_help("cache", "clean")
```
